name: LexCorp Associates
subtitle: Corporate & IP • Mumbai, MH
description: Top tier law firm specializing in high-stakes corporate litigation and tech mergers. Rated as Legal500 Tier 1.
bio: Adv. Anita Verma is a recognized expert in corporate litigation and intellectual property. With over a decade of experience representing Fortune 500 companies and high-growth startups...

name: Kapoor Legal Solutions
subtitle: Family & Divorce • Bangalore, KA
description: Compassionate representation for complex family matters, divorce mediation, and custody agreements.

name: Rao & Menon Legal
subtitle: Criminal Defense • Chennai, TN
description: Aggressive criminal defense attorneys with a track record of numerous acquittals and reduced sentences.
bio: Adv. Rao and Adv. Menon together form one of Chennai's most formidable criminal defense teams, known for landmark acquittals in sessions and high courts.

name: Sharma & Sons Legal
subtitle: Property & Real Estate • Delhi, DL
description: Delhi's trusted property law specialists handling land disputes, title verification, RERA matters, and ancestral property cases.
bio: Adv. Priya Sharma leads a family practice with deep roots in Delhi's property courts. Sharma & Sons Legal has resolved over 500 land dispute cases across NCR.

name: Iyer Law Chambers
subtitle: Tax & Finance • Hyderabad, TS
description: Expert tax litigation and financial advisory firm handling GST disputes, income tax appeals, and corporate restructuring.
bio: Adv. Rajan Iyer is a chartered accountant turned tax lawyer with an unmatched record in GST tribunal hearings and high-value income tax appeals across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh.

name: Bose & Partners
subtitle: Labour & Employment • Kolkata, WB
description: Dedicated labour law practice representing both employees and employers in industrial disputes, wrongful termination, and compliance matters.
bio: Adv. Subhash Bose founded Bose & Partners with a mission to provide affordable legal representation to workers and SMEs navigating India's complex labour law landscape.

name: Patel Legal Group
subtitle: Civil & Commercial • Ahmedabad, GJ
description: Full-service civil litigation firm handling commercial contracts, partnership disputes, and consumer protection cases across Gujarat.
bio: Adv. Meera Patel leads a dynamic team at Patel Legal Group, known for swift resolution of commercial disputes and a client-first approach to civil litigation in Gujarat High Court.

name: Nair & Associates
subtitle: Immigration & NRI • Kochi, KL
description: Kerala's leading immigration and NRI legal services firm assisting with visa issues, OCI matters, property disputes for NRIs, and international family law.
bio: Adv. Arun Nair has built Nair & Associates into Kerala's go-to firm for NRI legal matters, with a global client base spanning the Gulf, UK, and North America seeking expert Indian legal counsel.
